textByHash.4ae337195426ae54afd8531f33a28339b00190a5: Beware the Chambers of Xeric, adventurer.
textByHash.408478d635562d3b675fb305c57e0017028943bb: These dungeons and the perils within them are unique. You will encounter both dangerous and mysterious creatures here.
textByHash.b3eabaeb5cf26fbc9abdc26afe6c96adda0f9e4e: Remember that you may be kicked out at any time - any items dropped on the ground will be lost inside.
textByHash.1a8ac4bbcdfc62ab4fe7a41fff7dd2db446940a2: Do not allow your curiosity to get the better of you.
textByHash.4a7d882054cf57be6a5f9fb32630d782e030b67c: Of course, you have earned it.
